violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Observed refrigerator is not keeping food at 41F or below. Refrigeration repairman is scheduled to fix it.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed duct tape holding tray in place in freezer. Duct tape is not a cleanable surface.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed ceiling is acoustic tile and not a cleanable surface.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles in food prep area.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — ---Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed acoustic ceiling tiles in food prep area. They are neither smooth, nor cleanable.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles in food prep area.
Food service manager certification. — ---Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
